Body.Content:
A single group with broad membership or a special group for vendors etc. - can expose sensitive content to unintended recipients. With this new report, SharePoint admins can now see every site a group can access and the extent of that access.

GA date: June CY2026

message.Title: SharePoint: Admin Center - Data Access Governance - Permission report for a given group
